title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 2026
summary: Australia's Travel Rule enforcement activation, South Korea's institutional custody framework consultation, and Philippines' BSP supervision deadlines converge to create $185M+ in compliance infrastructure spend across 210+ exchanges, banks, and VASPs through Q4 2026. AUSTRAC's shift from guidance to active enforcement and FSC's custody framework create immediate wallet attribution and entity screening requirements where our 13-year entity graph delivers unfair advantage.
